```bash
bd close <id1> <id2> ...    # Close all completed issues at once
bd sync --flush-only        # Export to JSONL
```

```bash

bd create --title="Implement feature X" --description="Why this issue exists and what needs to be done" --type=feature
bd create --title="Write tests for X" --description="Why this issue exists and what needs to be done" --type=task
bd dep add beads-yyy beads-xxx  # Tests depend on Feature (Feature blocks tests)
```

- **Deacon session**: Alive
- **Deacon pane**: Actively working - "Schlepping..." (29s elapsed), processing wisp patrol steps (12/24 complete). Currently about to execute registered plugins (`hq-wisp-wisp-c7s9`).
- **In-progress beads**: 5 items in progress (wisp patrol epic + blocked tasks)
- **Activity feed**: Mostly boot session_start events; Deacon started at 14:14 and is still active

The Deacon is alive and actively working through its wisp patrol. It's mid-task with 12/24 steps complete and currently processing. No intervention needed.

Exiting cleanly.
